meta_title: Crypto AI | Real-Time Crypto Market Signal Support
meta_description: Crypto AI scans market structure in real time, filters weak setups, and helps traders focus on higher-quality crypto entries.
hero_title: Crypto AI finds cleaner setups before emotion takes over.
hero_lead: Watch the market in real time, filter weak entries, and focus on moves that deserve attention instead of chasing candles.
hero_card_copy: Get access to the launch version now and use it as a decision-support layer before making crypto entries.
disclaimer: Decision-support software. It does not guarantee profits and should not replace risk management.
features_intro: Built to reduce emotional entries and turn noisy market behavior into cleaner, more readable decision support.
why_heading: Most losses start before the trade is even opened.
why_copy: Traders usually get hurt by timing mistakes, weak conviction, or entering on noise. Crypto AI is built to slow that process down and surface better moments for review.
workflow_heading: Use it in three clear steps
workflow_intro: The workflow stays simple so you can move from market scan to action without getting buried in unnecessary complexity.
cta_heading: Get Crypto AI for the $3 launch price.
cta_copy: Early access is intentionally priced low so you can test the launch version before the future PRO upgrade expands the feature set.
footer_text: Crypto AI is built for market decision support, not guaranteed returns.

stats.label: Indicator stack behind the signal review
Focus on fewer, better market moments
Planned expansion with deeper strategy and news-aware logic

features.title: Real-Time Analysis
features.description: Tracks live OHLCV behavior so decisions are based on the current tape, not on delayed screenshots.

features.title: Signal Filtering
features.description: Filters weak setups and low-quality entries before FOMO or revenge trading takes over.

features.title: Indicator Stack
features.description: Combines EMA, RSI, ATR, VWAP, and volatility context to improve the quality of trade selection.

features.title: Paper Trade Review
features.description: Helps evaluate how signals would have behaved without forcing you to risk capital first.

features.title: Adaptive Learning
features.description: Built to evolve as new market data arrives so the model can improve with fresh conditions.

features.title: PRO Upgrade Path
features.description: A future PRO version can expand into additional strategies, stronger AI logic, and news-aware analysis.

reasons.title: Less emotional timing
reasons.description: Cuts down entries triggered by hype, panic, or fast-moving candles.

reasons.title: Cleaner market focus
reasons.description: Keeps attention on setups that deserve review instead of every chart move.

reasons.title: Faster decision support
reasons.description: Turns multiple indicators into one readable decision layer.

steps.title: Scan the market
steps.description: Monitor live crypto behavior and let the software highlight structure worth attention.

steps.title: Filter the setup
steps.description: Check whether the move still has quality after momentum, volatility, and trend filters.

steps.title: Act with context
steps.description: Use the signal as decision support and keep risk management in your own hands.
